language.title: Language
language.subtitle: App language for this device
language.hint: The language applies on this device and is remembered.

settings.themeHint: Theme applies instantly and is remembered on this device.
settings.accountLocalBody: Running in local mode — no sign-in required. To enable per-person login, configure these on the server:
settings.accountSignedInBody: Signed in via your identity provider. Switch profiles from the avatar in the nav.
settings.locationUnset: Set a location for the weather widget
settings.runWizardSub: Add members, chores, or a typical week
